contentHtml: Hello and welcome. Whether you are a fresh new Partner or a seasoned Legend who needs a reminder where is what, this channel IS the ultimate guide to Partner Programme for you (edited)
plainText: Hello and welcome. Whether you are a fresh new Partner or a seasoned Legend who needs a reminder where is what, this channel IS the ultimate guide to Partner Programme for you (edited)

contentHtml: Cosmetic perks: Every Partner gets 8k Ancient Coins monthly (this pool can be split for Creator teams in some cases), a Plunder Pass each Season and all Twitch Drops in advance. Twitch Drops: Your channel has been added to Partner exclusive Twitch Drops list. Please take a look at the #roadmap section to see when to expect next Drops. The assets and order for the Drops are usually uploaded to Sharepoint drive a week or two prior to their release and announced in #sharepoint-updates :PresenteHumilde: Giveaways: You have 3 Serpent's Lie Sails and 3 Gilded Phoenix Ship Sets to give away every month (from 1st to 31st) and 5 Plunder Passes per Season. You can stack the rewards and do more one month, but none next one, for example. If you plan to stack for bigger giveaways - just let me know. These prizes can only be used for events, contests and giveaways to boost your own channel, these can not be given to other creators, sold or monetized in any other way. In addition to that, we’d like to support a wide range of special events or videos that may require beyond normal levels of effort on your part. This could be a tournament, a charity event, a special piece of content or collaboration. Whatever you are up to we'd like to hear it and see if we could throw a little extra to help. So, here is the link for your regular prizes submission - https://microsofteur.sharepoint.com/sites/RareCreatorEngagement/SitePages/Partner-Program-Prize-Request-47627.aspx Usually the deadline is every Friday, unless we make an announcement about different time due to holidays or other reasons. Please allow up to 24 hours for all the cosmetics to be applied to your winners. As for outside of the usual rolling reward structure, please feel free to use this channel ( ⁠partner-event-requests ) allowing you to submit a short form requesting additional rewards to support something special. (edited)

contentHtml: ' Game Passes: Every Partner that plans on taking occasional breaks from being a pirate to make content on other games is entitled for an Ultimate Game Pass! Please be aware that these codes are for your own enjoyment and content creation only, they are not meant to be given away or sold in any shape or form. Please DM me if you would like to get a code! (edited)

(edited)

contentHtml: ️ SharePoint Assets Folder: It's the drive where you can find all sorts of SoT assets for your content creation shared to your email. Couple of particularly useful folders to check out are: 09_Music and 10_SFX - music and sound effects from the game 13_SoT_Branding - includes Partner Badge and Serpent's Lie Sails, SoT fonts, logos and a library of various high quality renders from the game. 16_TheGeeNee's_Treasure_Trove - even more high quality renders from the game Important to note, that SharePoint has quite a temperament sometimes and may kick out people randomly. Please DM me if you suddenly lose access and we'll sort this out for you. (edited)

contentHtml: Educational perks: Please check out #workshops thread for both upcoming and past sessions on content creation management and tips to succeed on every platform - YouTube, Twitch, TikTok and more. We always have something scheduled every month and encourage everyone to join both as listeners and as future speakers as well.

We always have something scheduled every month and encourage everyone to join both as listeners and as future speakers as well.

contentHtml: Creator Team: Every Partner can bring up to two of their closest collaborators or staff members - co-hosts, editors, managers or writers to the Programme and share some of their perks including access to Custom Servers, OneDrive folder and this Discord server if necessary. This means they will be covered by the same NDA and #code-of-conduct as you and you will be holding responsibility for them as part of your team. This perk also doesn't apply to chat moderators or other SoT Creators who have their own channels and wish to apply for Partner Programme themselves. Every case is a bit unique and evaluated individually. If you wish to get staff members or co-hosts on board as part of your Creator Team, please feel free to DM me to discuss the details. (edited)

This perk also doesn't apply to chat moderators or other SoT Creators who have their own channels and wish to apply for Partner Programme themselves. Every case is a bit unique and evaluated individually. If you wish to get staff members or co-hosts on board as part of your Creator Team, please feel free to DM me to discuss the details. (edited)

contentHtml:
Partner Legends: Is a special tier within a Partner Programme for those who accomplished bigger numbers on either their Twitch or Youtube channels with Sea of Thieves being their main game for a while. We picked a few already and will be adding to the list every month. There are no extra giveaways or drops or any perks to share with their viewers. It's just our way of saying thank you and acknowledge the creators who became great ambassadors for SoT and found success with it over time. The minimum requirements to be considered a Partner Legend are:
  • At least 30k WH a month consistently on Twitch or 8k daily views on YouTube
  • 30 hours of Sea of Thieves streamed per month
  • Be an existing Partner for at least a month
  • Be trustworthy and an excellent SoT ambassador
